title: StuckPacket
description: Schema for structured stuck packets emitted by Dev agents

worker_id.description: Identifier of the Dev worker (e.g., dev-1, dev-2)

attempt_count.description: Number of attempts made before getting stuck

failure_signature.description: Short slug describing the failure pattern

files_touched.description: Files that were modified or inspected during attempts

checks_failed.description: List of failed checks with commands and error excerpts

ask.description: Specific question or request for help
